value.found_quote: A profile is a named policy that combines filesystem rules, which define what commands can read or write, with network rules, which define which destinations commands can reach.
value.rationale: The page describes Codex permission profiles that combine filesystem rules to define what commands can read or write, with a dedicated "Filesystem permissions" section and `[permissions.<name>.filesystem]` configuration. The page states permission profiles are "Beta. Permission profiles are under active development and may change."
